parsed_output.justification: James admitted to being a werewolf during the discussion (transcript [114]), although he later claimed he was a villager and was only testing the other players. This erratic behavior and the subsequent retraction are highly suspicious and typical of a Werewolf attempting to bluff. While there was discussion about a role swap between Paul and Mitchell, James's direct admission makes him the most likely target for Team Village.
